# Codex Readme

This directory is the generated Codex adapter for My-Bookshelves.

Codex should read this directory first, then use `.agents/` as the shared
source of truth with Antigravity.

## Fast Read Order

1. `.codex/manifest.json`
2. `.codex/rules.md`
3. `AGENTS.md`
4. `.agents/rules/my-bookshelves.md`
5. The requested workflow under `.codex/workflows/`
6. The canonical skill/workflow files referenced by the workflow

## Generated Files

Run this after changing `.agents/`:

```powershell
python scripts/cli.py codex-sync --base-dir .
```

## Workflows

| Workflow | Codex adapter |
| --- | --- |
| `auto-organize` | `.codex/workflows/auto-organize.md` |

## Source Of Truth

| Purpose | Path |
| --- | --- |
| Codex routing | `.codex/manifest.json` |
| Codex rules summary | `.codex/rules.md` |
| Main Codex entrypoint | `AGENTS.md` |
| Shared project rules | `.agents/rules/my-bookshelves.md` |
| Shared workflows | `.agents/workflows/` |
| Shared skills | `.agents/skills/` |

Do not fork behavior into `.codex/` unless it is Codex-specific. If the
behavior should apply to both Codex and Antigravity, update `.agents/` and run
`codex-sync`.
